subject: 1p->3p inference economics: model the unit cost delta between first-party (direct Anthropic OAuth) and third-party (resold/gateway) inference, and the margin envelope for the chassis product

pass_if: per-1M-token cost computed for both 1p and 3p paths with cited rate sources
gross-margin % derived at 3 representative monthly volume tiers
break-even resale price identified where 3p margin >= 0
fail_if: any rate is uncited or assumed without source
margin not expressed as a function of volume

subject: Monthly burn model: build a 12-month burn-rate projection covering infra (Cloudflare Workers/Sandbox), inference spend, subprocessor fees, and fixed costs, with runway under base/lean scenarios

pass_if: monthly burn itemized across infra, inference, subprocessors, and fixed for 12 months
runway in months computed for base and lean scenarios against a stated starting cash
top-3 burn drivers ranked by share of spend
fail_if: burn presented as a single lump sum without line items

subject: Domain/registry registration costs: itemize one-time and recurring costs for domain registration, renewals, TLS, and registry/marketplace listing fees across the product's public surfaces

pass_if: each domain/registry line itemized with one-time vs annual recurring cost and cited registrar pricing
total year-1 and steady-state annual registration spend computed
any auto-renew or premium-TLD risk flagged
